case_title: AARON FEIGER VS. GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING CO. et al

docket_entries.description: PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-27-2014.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR STEPHEN MICHAEL MURPHY.
ARBITRATOR LAWRENCE GORDON LOSSING APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-28-2014 THROUGH JUN-26-2014.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FEIGER, AARON AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, JORGE ALBERTO GOLDEN GATE DISPOSAL & RECYCLING COMPANY $40,971.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40,971.00, PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER FROM SAID DEFENDANTS HIS STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT.
